en: I'm not your kid. You said you were going to Chicago.
My daughter can't see me this weekend. She's going skiing.
ko: 내 딸은 이번 주말에 나를 못 봐.

en: You said she was four years old. You're lying. She was four when I left. Now she's 15.
My wife's been remarried for 11 years. I see Grace every now and again.
I don't understand. Sure you do.
Sometimes it's easier living the lie.
ko: 때로는 거짓말 속에 사는 게 더 쉬운 거야.

en: I'm gonna let you fly tonight, Frank. Not even gonna try to stop you.
ko: 오늘 밤 너를 자유롭게 해줄게, 프랭크.

en: Because I know you'll be back on Monday. Yeah.
How do you know I'll come back?
ko: 어떻게 내가 돌아온다는 걸 아는 거야?
프랭크, 아무도 너를 쫓고 있지 않아.
프랭크, 아무도 너를 쫓고 있지 않아.

en: American Airlines Flight 131 to Pittsburgh is now ready for boarding.
ko: 아메리칸 항공 9131편, 피츠버그행 탑승 준비 완료.

en: After your boarding passes, please proceed to Gate 23A.
